description: Create Quick Action metadata XML files for all custom objects (Project__c, Sprint__c, User_Story__c, Task__c, Daily_Progress__c), create Screen Flow metadata for Complete Task Checklist and Update Task Status, create the Developer Process Guide LWC component, update page layouts to include quick actions, and update package.xml with all new metadata types.
steps:
Step 1: Create the directory force-app/main/default/quickActions/ and add the following quick action XML files:
  - Project__c.New_Sprint.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Create, targetObject: Sprint__c, set Project__c field to parent record)
  - Project__c.Update_Status.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Update, targetObject: Project__c, show Status__c field only)
  - Sprint__c.New_Story.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Create, targetObject: User_Story__c, set Sprint__c field to parent)
  - Sprint__c.New_Feature.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Create, targetObject: Feature__c, set Sprint__c field to parent)
  - Sprint__c.Update_Status.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Update, targetObject: Sprint__c, show Status__c field only)
  - User_Story__c.New_Task.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Create, targetObject: Task__c, set User_Story__c field to parent)
  - User_Story__c.Update_Status.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Update, targetObject: User_Story__c, show Status__c field. Include all 12 statuses: New, Dev In Progress, Pending, Dev Completed, Formalities InProgress, Completed - SIT Ready, PR InProgress, Sent to SIT, Sent to QA, Sent to UAT, Done, Rejected)
  - User_Story__c.Complete_Formalities.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Flow, flowDefinition: Complete_Story_Formalities)
  - Task__c.Update_Status.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Update, targetObject: Task__c, show Status__c and Blocked_Reason__c fields)
  - Task__c.Log_Progress.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Create, targetObject: Daily_Progress__c, set Task__c field to parent)
  - Task__c.Complete_Checklist.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Flow, flowDefinition: Complete_Task_Checklist)
  - Daily_Progress__c.New_Progress.quickAction-meta.xml (type: Create, targetObject: Daily_Progress__c)
  Each file must use API version 60.0 and follow standard Salesforce QuickAction metadata format.

Step 2: Create the directory force-app/main/default/flows/ and add the flow metadata file Complete_Task_Checklist.flow-meta.xml. This Screen Flow should:
  - Accept a recordId input variable (Task__c Id)
  - Use a Get Records element to fetch Task__c record (Task_Title__c, Status__c, Checklist_Complete__c)
  - Use a Get Records element to fetch all Task_Checklist_Item__c records where Task__c = recordId, ordered by Sequence__c ASC
  - Screen 1: Display task name, current checklist progress as text, and a checkbox group or individual checkboxes for each checklist item (showing Description__c as label, Is_Completed__c as value)
  - Use an Update Records element to update Task_Checklist_Item__c records with Is_Completed__c = true/false, Completed_Date__c = TODAY, Completed_By__c = running user
  - Screen 2: Show completion summary (how many items completed out of total)
  - Set processType to Flow, status to Active, API version 60.0
  NOTE: Use Salesforce Flow metadata XML format with proper processMetadataValues, screens, decisions, assignments, recordLookups, recordUpdates elements.

Step 3: Create the flow metadata file force-app/main/default/flows/Update_Task_Status.flow-meta.xml. This Screen Flow should:
  - Accept a recordId input variable (Task__c Id)
  - Get Records: fetch Task__c record (Task_Title__c, Status__c, Assigned_To__c, Task_Progress__c, Checklist_Complete__c, Blocked_Reason__c)
  - Screen 1: Display current task info (title, progress, assigned to) as read-only Display Text. Show a picklist/radio buttons for new status (New, In Progress, Blocked, Completed). Show a conditional text area for Blocked_Reason__c (only visible when Blocked is selected).
  - Decision element: If new status is 'Completed', check if Checklist_Complete__c is true. If not, show error screen saying checklist must be completed first.
  - Update Records: update the Task__c record with new Status__c (and Blocked_Reason__c if Blocked)
  - Final Screen: Show success message with new status
  - Set processType to Flow, status to Active, API version 60.0

Step 4: Create the LWC component force-app/main/default/lwc/developerProcessGuide/ with files:
  - developerProcessGuide.html: Visual step-by-step path/timeline showing the 13-step developer workflow:
    1. Pick up a Task (from assigned tasks)
    2. Set Status to 'In Progress'
    3. Log Daily Progress every day
    4. Complete all Checklist Items
    5. Mark Task as 'Completed'
    6. Once all tasks done -> Story moves to 'Dev Completed'
    7. Complete Pre-SIT Formalities (Unit Test Sheet, Deployment Steps, Business Dependency, AC Update, Peer Review)
    8. Story moves to 'Completed - SIT Ready'
    9. Raise PR -> 'PR InProgress'
    10. Deploy to SIT -> 'Sent to SIT'
    11. QA Testing -> 'Sent to QA'
    12. UAT -> 'Sent to UAT'
    13. Done!
  Use SLDS classes (slds-path, slds-timeline, slds-visual-picker or custom slds-grid based layout). Make it visually clean with step numbers, icons, and descriptions. Use lightning-icon where appropriate.
  - developerProcessGuide.js: Simple component with @api properties if needed. Track current step highlighting. Minimal logic - mostly presentational.
  - developerProcessGuide.css: Custom styling for the timeline/path visual. Responsive for mobile.
  - developerProcessGuide.js-meta.xml: Expose on lightning__HomePage and lightning__AppPage targets. API version 60.0.

Step 5: Update all page layouts to include quick actions in the platformActions section. Add a <platformActionList> element before </Layout> in each layout file:
  - force-app/main/default/layouts/Project__c-Project Layout.layout-meta.xml: Add New_Sprint, Update_Status actions
  - force-app/main/default/layouts/Sprint__c-Sprint Layout.layout-meta.xml: Add New_Story, New_Feature, Update_Status actions
  - force-app/main/default/layouts/User_Story__c-User Story Layout.layout-meta.xml: Add New_Task, Update_Status, Complete_Formalities actions
  - force-app/main/default/layouts/Task__c-Task Layout.layout-meta.xml: Add Update_Status, Log_Progress, Complete_Checklist actions
  - force-app/main/default/layouts/Daily_Progress__c-Daily Progress Layout.layout-meta.xml: Add New_Progress action
  The platformActionList should have actionListContext='Record' and include platformActionListItems with sortOrder and actionName referencing the quick actions (e.g., Project__c.New_Sprint).

Step 6: Update package.xml to add new metadata types:
  - Add QuickAction type with all 12 quick action members
  - Add Flow type with Complete_Task_Checklist and Update_Task_Status members
  - Add developerProcessGuide to the LightningComponentBundle type members
acceptance_criteria: 12 quick action XML files exist in force-app/main/default/quickActions/ with proper metadata format and API version 60.0
Complete_Task_Checklist.flow-meta.xml exists in force-app/main/default/flows/ with proper Screen Flow structure including screens, record lookups, and record updates
Update_Task_Status.flow-meta.xml exists in force-app/main/default/flows/ with proper Screen Flow structure including conditional logic for Blocked reason and Completed checklist validation
developerProcessGuide LWC exists with .html, .js, .css, and .js-meta.xml files showing the 13-step developer workflow with SLDS styling
developerProcessGuide is exposed on lightning__HomePage and lightning__AppPage targets
All 5 layout files include platformActionList elements referencing the appropriate quick actions
package.xml includes QuickAction type with all 12 members, Flow type with 2 members, and developerProcessGuide in LightningComponentBundle
verification: Check all XML files are well-formed by verifying they start with <?xml and have matching opening/closing tags
Verify package.xml contains QuickAction, Flow types and developerProcessGuide LWC member
Verify all quick action files reference correct targetObject and have proper field overrides
Verify flow files contain proper Flow metadata elements (processType, screens, recordLookups, recordUpdates)
Verify LWC meta.xml exposes component on HomePage and AppPage targets
findings: Quick Actions and Flows had structural deployment errors (missing TargetField elements, malformed Flow XML, wrong target config on LWC quick action). Fix: removed all 12 Quick Action files, 2 Flow files, platformActionList blocks from 5 layouts, and QuickAction/Flow sections from package.xml. The developerProcessGuide LWC is retained. Quick Actions and Flows should be recreated in the Salesforce UI post-deployment.
